What We Do

Our Services

01
✏️

Concepts & Designs

Creative concepts and detailed spatial designs that give your brand a powerful, immersive presence before a single structure is built.

02
🏗️

Fabrication & Execution

Precision-engineered booths and installations, crafted to the highest standards — delivered on time, every time, without compromise.

03
🎪

Conference & Exhibition Management

Seamless end-to-end management — logistics, vendor coordination, on-ground execution — so you can focus on your audience.

04
🌍

MICE Events

Meetings, Incentives, Conferences & Exhibitions crafted to inspire, engage, and deliver measurable ROI for your brand.

Our Story

Two Decades of Crafting Experiences

Founded on the belief that every event is an opportunity to tell a powerful story, Planted Brains has spent over 20 years translating brand visions into extraordinary live experiences for clients across industries.

🌏

Multi-City & Global Reach

We operate across multiple cities in India and internationally, bringing your brand to audiences wherever they are.

🔄

Full-Service Studio

From creative ideation to on-ground logistics — one team, one vision, zero friction.

🏆

Trusted by Leading Brands

Our portfolio spans Fortune 500 companies, government bodies, and emerging brands across diverse sectors.
